scripts.preinstall: node -e "const major = process.versions.node.split('.')[0]; if (major !== '24') { console.error('Learnika requires Node.js 24.x. Current: ' + process.version); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.test: node -e "console.log('No tests configured for Slice 1 monorepo baseline.')"
scripts.validate: pnpm.cmd run format:check && pnpm.cmd run lint && pnpm.cmd run typecheck && pnpm.cmd run test
